subject: Databases
title: The Future of Databases
description: A quick, practical guide to The Future of Databases.

hook.text: AI-powered query optimization, edge databases, and serverless Postgres — the future is already here.

buildup.text: Edge databases like Turso put SQLite replicas worldwide. Data lives close to the user for speed.

discovery.text: Vector databases (Pinecone, pgvector) power AI search. They store embeddings, not just rows.

twist.text: Postgres keeps adding features: JSON, vectors, full-text search. One database to rule many use cases.

climax.text: The trend is clear: databases are getting smarter, cheaper, and closer to the user.

punchline.text: Databases evolve fast. The best time to learn is now.

quiz.question: What do vector databases store that traditional databases don't?
options: Numerical embeddings used for AI-powered similarity search
